mhriseGameNotInstalled: Please install the game first, then try installing the mod again!
mhriseVersionUnsupported: This game version is not supported, so the mod cannot be installed!
mhriseVersionChanged: The game version has changed. Please uninstall installed mods first, or use Force Clean and reinstall them!
dontStarveFrameworkMissing: The prerequisite framework mod required by Don't Starve was not detected. You can download it from the Mod Store. If you force the installation, the current mod may not work. Continue?
disableFailed: Operation failed, please check the SD card files!
disableSuccess: All game mods have been disabled!
enableSuccess: All game mods have been restored!
confirmDisable: Disable all installed mods for this game?
confirmEnable: Re-enable all installed mods for this game?
restoreNameMsg:
Confirm restoring the display name to this name?

{}
inputGameVersion: Enter the compatible game version number
editNameDesc: Customize the display name of the current mod
editRestoreNameDesc: Delete custom name and restore to the mod file's directory name
editTypeDesc: Set the functional type of the current mod
editDescDesc: Edit the description of the current mod
editModVerDesc: Set the version number of the current mod
editGameVerDesc:
Set the compatible game version for the current mod
 - Enter 0 to indicate the mod is compatible with all game versions
editAuthorDesc: Set the author information of the current mod
forceCleanCompleted:
Cleanup complete! Please reinstall the mods you need.
Time elapsed: {}
forceCleanConfirm: This will force uninstall all mod files for this game, including manually installed mods on the SD card. You will need to reinstall them manually. Proceed with caution!
removeModDesc:
Remove the current mod from the mod list; mod files will be moved to transit
 - When only one mod remains, removal can only be done from the game list page
disableModDesc:
Disable all mods for this game so they no longer take effect.
 - Manually installed mods will also be disabled
 - Mainly used to quickly disable mods for game troubleshooting
viewPathDesc: View the current mod's location on the SD card
viewAuthorDesc: View the mod author's related links via QR code
mtpTransferDesc:
Transfer mod files via USB connection
 - Faster transfer speed, but may fail when transferring folder-type mods with a large number of small files
 - For mods with many small files, it is recommended to pack them into a ZIP archive first, or use FTP for more stable transfers
ftpTransferDesc:
Transfer mod files via Wi-Fi
 - Slower transfer speed; recommend using a third-party FTP client with 6 threads enabled for better efficiency
transitEmpty: Please use  on the home page to select MTP or FTP to transfer mod files to the transit station first, then select mods in Local Add to add them to the current list. Refer to the menu hints for MTP and FTP notes.
removeModConfirm:
Confirm removing this mod?
Custom name, description and other content will be deleted
MOD will be moved to the transit station and can be re-added
removeLastModConfirm: This is the last mod. Removing it will also delete the game project. The mod will be moved to the transit station and can be re-added.
addProjectSubmenuDesc:
Choose a method to add mods to the current list
 - Store Add
 - Local Add
storeAddSubmenuDesc:
Add mods from the online mod store, use  on this page to quickly jump to the store
 - Mod Store
 - Upload Mod
localAddDesc:
Add mods from local transit station to the current list, use  on this page to quickly jump to Local Add
 - Select Mod
 - MTP Transfer
 - FTP Transfer
selectModDesc: Select and add mods from the transit station to the current list
viewModSubmenuDesc:
View store detail pages and author links for cloud-downloaded mods
 - Mod Detail
 - View Author
manageSubmenuDesc:
Manage mods for the current game
 - Edit Project
 - Remove Mod
 - View Path
editSubmenuDesc:
Customize mod content
 - Display name
 - Restore name
 - Mod type
 - Mod description
 - Mod version
 - Compatible version
 - Mod author
firstLaunchBasicBody: This page is for managing mods for the current game. Select a mod and press  to install or uninstall it. Do not leave this page during installation or uninstallation to avoid data corruption. If an issue occurs, use "Force Clean" from the menu to repair it.
firstLaunchShortcutsBody:
- Press  to quickly open the mod store for the current game.
- Press  to quickly open the local add menu or use the transfer features.
- Press  to open the menu and view more management options.
firstLaunchLocalAddBody: First, use MTP or FTP from the  menu to transfer mod files to the transit area. Then select the mods you want to add under "Local Add". Please refer to the menu descriptions for MTP and FTP precautions.
firstLaunchNoticeBody: All files and directories must use English-only names. Using non-English characters will cause the operation to fail and leave residual files.
mhriseFirstLaunchTitle: Monster Hunter Rise: All Versions Supported!
mhriseFirstLaunchBody: Because this game's mod management rules are very complex, install and uninstall mods only through this manager. Using a third-party manager, or manually adding or modifying Monster Hunter Rise mod files on the SD card, will inevitably cause installation or uninstallation errors.
mhriseFirstLaunchTroubleshootingBody: If mod issues occur, use "Force Clean" from the menu to quickly delete all Monster Hunter Rise mod files from the SD card, then reinstall the mods you need.
dontStarveFirstLaunchTitle: Don't Starve (Single Player) Is Now Fully Supported!
dontStarveFirstLaunchBody: This game's management rules are complex, and although the manager supports manually added mods, it cannot synchronize records of those operations, causing its management state to differ from the actual files on the SD card. Therefore, use this manager consistently for installation and uninstallation rather than mixing it with third-party managers or manual changes.
dontStarveFirstLaunchUsageBody: Mods for this game require a prerequisite framework, which can be downloaded and installed from the Mod Store. Once the framework is installed, all other mods can be installed or uninstalled directly through this manager; required special directories and numbering are handled automatically.
dontStarveFirstLaunchTroubleshootingBody: If mod issues occur, use "Force Clean" from the menu to quickly delete all Don't Starve mod files from the SD card, then reinstall the mods you need.
unmanagedDetectedBody: Mods for this game that are not yet managed by this manager were detected on the SD card. To prevent installation status conflicts and leftover files, these mods must first be extracted into the manager before you can continue managing this game.
unmanagedExtractionBody: Extraction only moves the relevant files from the system mod directory into the manager. Cheats and other mod files will be saved separately. Extracted mods are left uninstalled by default, and you can reinstall them.
unmanagedNoticeBody: Do not exit the application or power off the console during extraction. Selecting "Back" returns to the Home page, selecting "Confirm" starts extraction immediately.
forceCleanDesc:
Used to fix corrupted counter files caused by abnormal interruption during mod install or uninstall.
 - This will force uninstall all mods for this game, including manually installed mods on SD card. Use with caution.
 - Corrupted counter files may cause conflict detection errors and incomplete mod uninstallation.
storeModListDesc: Browse mods for the current game in the store
storeModDetailDesc: View store details of the currently selected mod
uploadModDesc:
- Scan QR code to visit the web store
 - The website only provides browsing and mod upload services
 - Uploading pornographic, political, sensitive or illegal content is prohibited and will result in permanent ban
 - URL: https://tom-switch.fun
